findings.detail: Only one template option means I don't feel like I'm designing my site, just filling in blanks.
findings.proposed_solution: Offer more template choices so I can pick a design that feels right for my brand.

findings.detail: Not seeing clear labels on the 'chips' makes me hesitant to click them, not knowing what they do.
findings.proposed_solution: Add clear labels to all interactive elements so I understand their function before clicking.

warnings.detail: Only one template option means I don't feel like I'm designing my site, just filling in blanks.
Not seeing clear labels on the 'chips' makes me hesitant to click them, not knowing what they do.
